name: ShaprAI
description: Agent personality shaping and lifecycle framework - Create, evolve, and manage AI agent personalities with structured templates, lifecycle management, and fleet orchestration

capabilities.name: template_engine
capabilities.description: Structured personality templates for agent creation

capabilities.name: lifecycle_management
capabilities.description: Manage agent evolution through defined lifecycle stages

capabilities.name: driftlock
capabilities.description: Embedding-based similarity detection for personality drift

capabilities.name: fleet_management
capabilities.description: Orchestrate multiple agents with coordinated behaviors

capabilities.name: sanctuary
capabilities.description: Interactive lesson runner for agent training
